consequences: Future revisions should weaken or remove any sentence that turns the models into universal proof. Section 7 limitations are part of the required shape of the post, not optional caveats.
context: The post's core thesis is institutional and conceptual, but several older draft claims overstated what the models established.
decision: Allow strong claims about monetary position, sectoral logic, and policy mismatch, but keep simulation-derived claims calibration-specific, mechanism-level, and explicitly bounded by the audit.
title: Simulation claims stay narrower than institutional thesis
